qa_pair.question: Run the local viewer, request POST /api/practitioner-queue with role practitioner and include_synthetic_cases true, and inspect the returned role context. Which role is active? Answer with the exact role identifier only.
Request the synthetic practitioner queue. How many case projections are returned? Answer with digits only.
Request the synthetic practitioner queue and use its risk ordering. Which case reference is first? Answer with the exact case reference only.
Inspect every review_control object in the synthetic practitioner queue. Is self-approval allowed for any case? Answer true or false in lowercase.
Inspect a handoff in the synthetic practitioner queue. Express the shared case direction as from_role->to_role using exact role identifiers.
Attempt to request POST /api/practitioner-queue with role taxpayer and include_synthetic_cases true. Which HTTP status code is returned? Answer with digits only.
